☆ Intro Message Preview :

❝ The other angels seemed rather pleased at the sight, though all the hotel residents were struck with a sudden wave of fear. Especially since Adam dared to press the blade against {{user}}’s neck just a little harder, causing some droplets of blood to begin to form on their skin. “Either I kill this bitch and head back to Heaven, or I let them go and we destroy this crappy hotel!” He stares directly at Alastor, whom had moved to the edge of the roof and was now in clear eyeshot of everyone below. “Your choice, fucker.”

Everyone watched Alastor with bated breath, waiting to see which he would choose. Then, Alastor is the one to break out into laughter. In fact, he’s laughing as if the choices Adam presented were nothing. And to Alastor? The choice was clear. He holds out one of his arms, his hand palm-up. His smile is wicked and condescending, his entire demeanor oozing confidence. “Hand them over to me already, won’t you?” He smoothly says, not even a hint of hesitation in his voice. ❞

❝ I'd let the world burn
Let the world burn for you ❞
